arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest and Man City fans hold minute's applause for Stuart Pearce following the England legend's health scare on flight from Las Vegas
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest and Man City fans paid a heart-warming tribute to Stuart Pearce, after the England legend suffered a health scare on a plane this week.

Forest v Man City team news: Marmoush benched
arts.sum: Two changes for City from Gameweek 27 The post Forest v Man City team news: Marmoush benched appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Guardiola makes nine changes for Forest clash
arts.sum: It’s two changes from the team that started the last Premier League game against Tottenham - Bernardo and Foden replacing Omar Marmoush and Mateo Kovacic who drop to the bench in the East Midlands. The Blues are looking to qualify for the elite European competition for a 15th successive season while Forest have been the surprise package this term as they fly high in their third campaign back in the top-flight, following 16th and 17th place finishes.

Keep ‘em peeled, everyone. Kick-off is at 12.30pm GMT. It’s behind you! on! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Manchester City – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Saturday lunchtime’s offering is a crunch match in the race for Champions League qualification as Nottingham Forest host Manchester City. Forest enter the match with only one win in regular time in the last seven matches.
